x.name: Alex Hormozi
x.bio: Co-Founder: https://t.co/gQN7OehYd2, https://t.co/VLS8LzeasI. Business Owners: Get your 2026 free scaling roadmap 👇

tweets.text: You prove haters wrong with outcomes not arguments.

The only scheduling that has worked for me:
Schedule in the long term important stuff and assume urgent matters will fill in the cracks. And 9 times out of 10 urgent (unimportant) matters resolve themselves by ignoring them long enough to accomplish the important ones.

The biggest lie I believed for the first 10yrs of being a business owner was that scaling was about getting more customers. It's about getting customers to never leave.

Scaling looks like a flat retention curve, and when your business never gets smaller, it scales by default.
